stories.story: As a Patient, I want to register and log in so that I can use the appointment system.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['Registration requires email, password, role selection.', 'Login validates credentials; session created.', 'Logout clears session.']

stories.story: As a Patient, I want to view available doctors on a selected date so that I can choose one.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['GET /api/doctors?date= returns doctors working that day.', 'Doctors have names, departments, profile photos.']

stories.story: As a Patient, I want to see a doctor's available slots and select one so that I can book an appointment.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['GET /api/doctors/<id>/availability?date= returns time slots.', 'Slots respect shifts, 30-min increments, capacity.']

stories.story: As a Patient, I want to request an appointment so that my request is sent for review.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['POST /api/appointments creates Pending Review appointment.', 'Validation: future weekday, allowed type, slot available.']

stories.story: As a Patient, I want to cancel my own appointment request so that I can remove it.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['DELETE /api/appointments/<id> only by creator.', 'Status updated to Cancelled.']

stories.story: As a Patient, I want to reschedule a pending appointment so that I can choose a new slot.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['PATCH /api/appointments/<id>/reschedule with new date/time.', 'Only if status is Pending Review.']

stories.story: As a Doctor, I want to view my appointment queue so that I can review requests.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['GET /api/appointments returns appointments for my linked doctor.', 'Filter by status, date.']

stories.story: As a Doctor, I want to confirm or cancel an appointment with a note so that the patient knows the outcome.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['PATCH /api/appointments/<id>/review with note.', 'Only for my own appointments.']

stories.story: As an Admin, I want to view all appointment queues so that I can manage the system.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['Admin sees all appointments, not scoped to one doctor.']

stories.story: As an Admin, I want to create a doctor account and profile so that new doctors can be added.
stories.acceptance_criteria: ['POST /api/admin/doctors creates user and doctor record.', 'Profile includes department, photo.']

stories.story: As the Clinic System, I want to provide a non-diagnostic administrative summary for an appointment so that staff can review scheduling context without medical advice.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given an existing appointment, when GET /api/appointments/<id>/summary is called, then the response contains only administrative appointment details and status, with no diagnosis or treatment advice.
